concerns.text: T017 and T024 both modify src/utils/logging.py. T017 sets up base logging infrastructure; T024 implements seed/version logging. T024 must explicitly depend on T017 completion, but this dependency is not documented. Same-file modification without explicit ordering creates implementation conflict.

T039-T041 update state/artifact_hashes after config changes, but T016 (checksum tracking infrastructure) is not explicitly listed as a prerequisite. T039-T041 depend on T016's artifact_hashes map existing; this dependency must be documented to prevent consumer-before-producer violation.
